recommendations.title: With a Friend Like Harry...
recommendations.overview: While fixing up their summer cottage, Michel and his family run into a man who claims to have gone to high school with Michel.

recommendations.title: Lemming
recommendations.overview: After the death of his boss's wife, a young engineer faces the sudden psychological metamorphosis of his own wife, seemingly possessed by the soul of the deceased...

recommendations.title: Only the Animals
recommendations.overview: Following the disappearance of the glamorous and secretive Evelyne Ducat during a blizzard in the highlands of southern France, the lives of five people inextricably linked to Evelyne are brought together to devastating effect as the local police inv

recommendations.title: Case 137
recommendations.overview: Stéphanie, a police officer working for Internal Affairs, is assigned to a case involving a young man severely wounded during a tense and chaotic demonstration in Paris. While she finds no evidence of illegitimate police violence, the case takes a pe

recommendations.title: The Monk
recommendations.overview: A virtuous monk descends to the depths of sin and depravity after Satan sends an unholy temptress to lead him astray.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Good Manners
recommendations.overview: Clara, a lonely nurse from the outskirts of São Paulo, is hired by mysterious and wealthy Ana as the nanny for her unborn child. The two women develop a strong bond, but soon Clara discovers a terrifying secret about the child.

recommendations.title: Much Loved
recommendations.overview: A social drama about four marginalized prostitutes in Marrakech and their complex relations with their families and society at large.

recommendations.title: Reptile
recommendations.overview: Following the brutal murder of a young real estate agent, a hardened detective attempts to uncover the truth in a case where nothing is as it seems, and by doing so dismantles the illusions in his own life.

recommendations.title: Perdida
recommendations.overview: A policewoman whose childhood friend disappeared in Patagonia years ago starts a new search to find answers, and soon finds her own life in danger.
